description: Official statistical data on MitID/AltID usage, authentication method distribution, platform usage, and user demographics. Used to benchmark current platform dependency and inform the baseline assessment.
steps_to_find: Navigate to the Danish Agency for Digital Government portal.
Locate the latest digital identity usage reports.
Download the datasets (CSV/Excel) and verify metadata.
Store data in the project data repository.

document_name: Existing Denmark Digital Identity Legislation and Procurement Regulations
description: Official texts of Danish laws, regulations, and procurement guidelines related to digital identity, AltID procurement documents, and Digitaliseringsstyrelsen guidelines. Essential for legal compliance and procurement influence.
steps_to_find: Search the Danish government legal portal (Retsinformation).
Download PDFs of relevant statutes, regulations, and procurement documents.
Check for recent amendments and cross‑reference with EU directives.
Archive documents in the legal repository.

document_name: EU eIDAS Regulation Text and Technical Standards
description: Official EU eIDAS regulation, eIDAS2 technical specifications, and ETSI standards relevant to digital identity. Provides the regulatory framework for EU standards engagement.
steps_to_find: Visit the European Commission eIDAS portal.
Download the regulation text and technical standard PDFs.
Verify version numbers and update dates.
Store documents in the EU standards repository.

description: Data on global and Danish adoption of FIDO2, usage statistics, vendor support, and security incident reports. Used to assess technical feasibility and benchmark demonstrator performance.
steps_to_find: Access the FIDO Alliance website and download the latest adoption reports.
Retrieve national security agency publications on FIDO2 usage.
Compile datasets into a consolidated spreadsheet.
Validate data accuracy with the security team.

description: Official data on GrapheneOS usage, security incidents, and community metrics. Provides insight into the viability of a mobile‑oriented demonstrator.
steps_to_find: Visit the GrapheneOS project website.
Download security reports, release notes, and community statistics.
Cross‑reference with independent security analyses.
Archive data in the project repository.

document_name: Existing EU Digital Identity Wallet Standards Documents
description: Official documents on the EU Digital Identity Wallet framework, eIDAS2, ETSI standards, and EU working group outputs. Needed for EU standards engagement strategy.
steps_to_find: Access the European Commission Digital Single Market portal.
Download the latest Digital Identity Wallet framework documents.
Retrieve ETSI standard PDFs and WG meeting minutes.
Store documents in the EU standards repository.
